rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
